::: thesis" }, { "title": "The Propagation Principle", "text": "Whatever you choose at Q2 becomes your substrate. That substrate must answer **every subsequent question** --- Q3 through Q12 --- without contradiction. Where it can\'t answer, that\'s a **blank**. Where it contradicts itself, that\'s a **death**. Where it answers only by borrowing from another substrate\'s vocabulary, that\'s **strain**. The accumulated cost of \"strain\" positions becomes unsustainable --- typically by Q6--Q8.
At each node, **published secular theories** are embedded --- showing what physics already proved and what questions it left front and center. Those open questions converge on the same shape: the form of the boundary conditions (BC1--BC8).
:::

::: panel-label" }, { "title": "Published Theories --- The God-Shaped Holes Begin", "text": ":::
::: p-item
**Wheeler (1990)** --- \"It from Bit\": physical reality derives from binary distinctions.
:::
::: p-item
**Landauer (1961)** --- Information erasure costs physical energy (kT ln 2). Information is physical.
:::
::: p-item
**Shannon (1948)** --- Information = reduction of uncertainty between distinguishable states.
:::
::: p-item
**Holographic Principle (Bekenstein/Hawking)** --- S = A/4ℓ²ₚ. Information content is the fundamental thing; geometry is derived.
:::
::::::::
:::::::: {.panel .question-panel}
::: panel-label" }, { "title": "Questions These Theories Left Open", "text": ":::
::: p-item
Wheeler: **Where does the bit come from?** What instantiates it?
:::
::: p-item
Landauer: **Why does information cost energy?** What\'s the deeper coupling?
:::
::: p-item
Holographic: **Why is geometry derived from information** rather than the reverse?
:::
::: p-item
→ All three questions point to: **the substrate that carries information.**
:::
::::::::
:::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::: {.panel .theory-panel}
::: panel-label" }, { "title": "Published Theories", "text": ":::
::: p-item
**Kolmogorov Complexity** --- Shortest program length. Ordered systems are compressible.
:::
::: p-item
**Tononi IIT (2004)** --- Φ measures integrated information. Order = irreducible whole \> sum of parts.
:::
::: p-item
**Friston Free Energy (2010)** --- Living systems minimize surprise = maintain internal order.
:::
::: p-item
**Second Law of Thermodynamics** --- Closed systems trend toward disorder. Order requires explanation.
:::
::::::::
:::::::: {.panel .question-panel}
::: panel-label
Questions Left Open → BC-Shaped
:::
::: p-item
Tononi: Φ measures coherence but **what generates it?** → BC2 (external source)
:::
::: p-item
Friston: Systems minimize surprise but **what set the prior?** → BC1 (terminal observer)
:::
::: p-item
Second Law: Entropy increases --- **where does order come from?** → BC6 (infinite energy source)
:::
::: p-item
Kolmogorov: Compressibility exists --- **why is the universe compressible at all?** → Q4
:::
::::::::
:::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

---

:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::: panels
:::::::: {.panel .theory-panel}
::: panel-label
Published Theories --- Secular Physics\' Own Stopping Point
:::
::: p-item
**Hawking/Mlodinow (2010)** --- \"Model-dependent realism.\" Physics describes, doesn\'t explain ground.
:::
::: p-item
**Tegmark (2014)** --- Mathematical Universe Hypothesis. Reality IS math. But causation gap.
:::
::: p-item
**Penrose (2004)** --- Three-world model: physical, mental, mathematical. No single ground.
:::
::: p-item
**Cosmological Argument** --- Regress must terminate. What terminates it?
:::
::::::::
:::::::: {.panel .question-panel}
::: panel-label
Questions Left Open → These ARE the Form of God
:::
::: p-item
Why these laws and not others? → **Self-grounding, non-arbitrary substrate**
:::
::: p-item
Why is math \"unreasonably effective\"? (Wigner 1960) → **Because math describes the substrate**
:::
::: p-item
What breaks the regress? → **Self-reference. Self-grounding entity.**
:::
::: p-item
Every open question at Q4 has the SHAPE of BC1 + Q5 properties.
:::
::::::::
:::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

**Gödel (1931)** --- Self-referencing systems produce undecidable truths. Self-grounding must be richer than formal systems.

::: p-item
**Tarski (1936)** --- Truth about a system can\'t be defined within it. Self-grounding requires transcendence.
:::
::: p-item
**Noether (1918)** --- Conservation laws follow from symmetries. Coherence conserved if ground has right symmetries.

Does observation chain terminate or regress? → Q7

:::

:::

:::
